content_fingerprint: hugging face adds machine readable agents endpoint to all gradio spaces every gradio space now exposes a standardized agents md endpoint letting ai coding agents like claude code codex and pi discover and invoke space capabilities without any manual configuration hugging face has updated its platform so that every gradio space automatically serves an agents md endpoint a machine readable api description that ai coding agents can parse and act on directly the feature was listed on the hugging face changelog on april 17 2026 and carries 139 upvotes from the community the agents md file functions
